blocks.text: By accessing or using the BlakTickets platform (website or app), you agree to be bound by these Terms & Conditions. These terms apply to all users including customers, event organizers, and partners. If you do not agree with any part of these terms, you must not use the platform. Continued use of BlakTickets constitutes acceptance of any updated terms. We recommend reviewing these terms periodically for changes.

Users must be at least 13 years of age to use BlakTickets services. Users between 13–17 years may access only age-appropriate events and limited features. By using the platform, you confirm that all information provided is accurate and lawful. We reserve the right to restrict access if eligibility conditions are not met. Parental guidance may be required for certain transactions involving minors.

Users must create an account using valid credentials such as mobile number, email, or social login. You are responsible for maintaining confidentiality of your account and login credentials. BlakTickets is not responsible for unauthorized access caused by user negligence. Any suspicious or fraudulent account activity may result in suspension or termination. Users must immediately notify support in case of account compromise.

BlakTickets is a platform that enables users to discover, book, and manage event tickets. Event organizers can create, publish, and manage events through the platform. Users agree to use the platform only for lawful and authorized purposes. Any misuse of services, system interference, or data manipulation is strictly prohibited. We reserve the right to monitor usage to ensure platform integrity.

All bookings made through BlakTickets are subject to availability and confirmation. A booking is considered confirmed only after successful payment and system approval. Users must verify event details such as date, time, and venue before booking. BlakTickets is not responsible for incorrect bookings made by users. Tickets once issued are subject to organizer-defined rules and entry conditions.

Ticket prices are determined by event organizers and may include service fees. BlakTickets may charge a platform fee for facilitating bookings. All applicable taxes, including GST, will be displayed during checkout where required. Prices may change without prior notice until the booking is confirmed. Users agree to pay all charges associated with their transaction.

BlakTickets supports multiple payment methods including UPI, cards, net banking, and wallets. Payments are processed through secure third-party payment gateways. We do not store sensitive payment details such as card CVV or PIN. Users are responsible for ensuring successful transaction completion. Failed transactions will be handled as per payment gateway policies.

Refunds and cancellations are governed by the respective event organizers. Some tickets may be non-refundable depending on event policy. BlakTickets only facilitates refund processing where applicable. Refund timelines depend on payment gateways and banks. Disputes regarding refunds must be raised within a reasonable timeframe.

Event organizers are solely responsible for event quality, execution, and safety. BlakTickets does not guarantee performance, content, or conduct of any event. Any changes, cancellations, or rescheduling are controlled by organizers. Users attend events at their own risk and discretion. BlakTickets acts only as an intermediary platform.

Users must not engage in fraudulent bookings, ticket reselling, or unauthorized access. Any attempt to hack, disrupt, or misuse the platform is strictly prohibited. Fake event listings or impersonation of users or organizers is not allowed. Violation may lead to immediate account suspension or legal action. We reserve the right to investigate and act on suspicious behavior.

All content on BlakTickets including logos, designs, software, and branding is protected. Users may not copy, modify, or distribute platform content without permission. Event content belongs to respective organizers and is their responsibility. Unauthorized use of intellectual property may result in legal consequences. All rights not expressly granted are reserved by BlakTickets.

BlakTickets is not responsible for losses arising from event cancellations or disruptions. We are not liable for injuries, damages, or dissatisfaction during events. Our responsibility is limited to facilitating ticketing services only. Users agree that platform liability is limited to the extent permitted by law. We are not responsible for third-party actions or failures.

BlakTickets is not liable for failure to perform due to circumstances beyond control. This includes natural disasters, technical failures, government actions, or internet outages. Such events may impact platform availability or event execution. We will make reasonable efforts to restore services as soon as possible. No compensation is guaranteed for such disruptions.

User data is handled as per our Privacy Policy. By using the platform, users consent to data collection and processing. We use data only for service improvement, security, and transaction processing. We do not sell user data to unauthorized third parties. Users are advised to review the Privacy Policy separately.

We may suspend or terminate accounts for violation of terms or suspicious activity. Users may also delete their accounts at any time through support or settings. Termination may result in loss of access to bookings or services. Certain data may be retained for legal or operational reasons. We reserve full discretion in enforcing account actions.

BlakTickets may update these Terms & Conditions at any time. Changes will be posted on the platform and take effect immediately or as stated. Continued use of the platform implies acceptance of updated terms. Users are encouraged to review terms regularly. We are not required to provide individual notice for minor updates.

These Terms are governed by the laws of India. Any disputes shall fall under the jurisdiction of courts in Bangalore, Karnataka. Users agree to resolve disputes through applicable legal channels. Platform decisions may be used as supporting evidence in disputes. Legal proceedings must follow applicable Indian regulations.

For any queries regarding these Terms & Conditions, users may contact us. Email: blakticketssupport@gmail.com Phone: +91 6300844129 Location: Bangalore, Karnataka, India Support will respond within a reasonable timeframe.

Users agree to maintain respectful and lawful behavior while using BlakTickets. Any harassment, abuse, spamming, or harmful conduct toward other users or organizers is strictly prohibited. We reserve the right to investigate complaints and take appropriate action. Repeated violations may result in permanent account suspension. Platform access is conditional on adherence to conduct standards.

Event organizers are fully responsible for the accuracy of event listings and related information. This includes pricing, timing, venue details, and event execution. BlakTickets does not verify or guarantee organizer claims beyond basic platform checks. Any disputes arising from misleading listings must be addressed with the organizer directly. We may remove events that violate platform policies or laws.

Tickets purchased on BlakTickets may be non-transferable unless explicitly allowed by the event organizer. Unauthorized resale or duplication of tickets is strictly prohibited. Digital tickets remain valid only under system verification through QR or unique IDs. Any misuse of tickets may result in denial of entry without refund. BlakTickets is not responsible for third-party ticket resale fraud.

We strive to maintain uninterrupted access to the platform but do not guarantee continuous availability. Maintenance, updates, or technical issues may temporarily affect services. BlakTickets is not liable for losses caused by system downtime. We will make reasonable efforts to restore services quickly. Users acknowledge and accept possible service interruptions.

Users are responsible for maintaining secure access to their accounts and devices. Any activity conducted through a user account will be assumed authorized by the user. BlakTickets is not liable for unauthorized access due to weak security practices. Users must immediately report any suspected breach or misuse. Failure to maintain account security is solely the user's responsibility.

By using the platform, users consent to the collection and processing of necessary data. This includes data required for verification, transactions, and service optimization. We may use aggregated data for improving platform performance and analytics. Such usage will not personally identify individual users. Consent is considered ongoing until account deletion.

All disputes between users and organizers should first be attempted to resolve directly. BlakTickets may assist as a facilitator but not as a legal authority. We may review platform data to support dispute resolution where required. Final decisions regarding platform-related disputes remain at our discretion. Legal disputes shall follow applicable Indian jurisdiction.

BlakTickets may run promotional campaigns, discounts, or offers from time to time. Participation in such promotions is optional and subject to specific terms. We reserve the right to modify or withdraw promotions without prior notice. Misuse of promotional offers may lead to account restrictions. All promotional decisions are final and binding.

Any feedback, suggestions, or ideas submitted by users become the property of BlakTickets. We may use such input without obligation to compensate or credit users. Feedback may be used to improve services, features, or platform design. Users waive any intellectual property claims over submitted suggestions. Submission of feedback implies consent to its unrestricted use.

BlakTickets reserves the final authority in interpreting and enforcing these Terms & Conditions. All decisions made by the platform in good faith shall be considered binding. This includes handling of disputes, violations, and policy enforcement. Users agree to comply with platform decisions within legal boundaries. This clause ensures operational consistency and platform integrity.

Users confirm that all information provided during registration is true, complete, and accurate. Any false or misleading information may result in suspension or permanent termination of the account. BlakTickets is not responsible for issues arising from incorrect user-provided data. Users must update their information promptly if any changes occur. Accuracy of data is essential for smooth service delivery.

Entry to any event is subject to verification of valid tickets and compliance with event rules. Event organizers may refuse entry for violation of venue policies or safety guidelines. BlakTickets does not control physical entry decisions at event locations. Users must adhere to all instructions issued by organizers or venue authorities. Final entry approval lies with the event organizer.

BlakTickets uses digital systems such as QR codes and unique identifiers for ticket validation. Any attempt to duplicate, alter, or misuse verification codes is strictly prohibited. Validation failures due to tampering or misuse will result in denied entry. We are not responsible for issues caused by damaged or altered tickets. Users must ensure secure handling of digital tickets.

We actively monitor platform activity to identify misuse, fraud, or automated abuse. Suspicious behavior may trigger verification checks or temporary restrictions. Accounts involved in abusive behavior may be permanently disabled. Monitoring is conducted to protect platform integrity and user safety. Users consent to such monitoring when using the platform.

All event-related content including descriptions, images, and schedules is provided by organizers. BlakTickets does not guarantee the accuracy or completeness of such content. Users rely on organizer-provided information at their own discretion. We may remove content that violates legal or platform standards. Responsibility for content lies solely with the respective organizer.

Payment-related disputes must be addressed through the respective payment gateway or bank. BlakTickets facilitates transactions but does not control payment processing outcomes. Refund approvals are subject to organizer policies and payment provider rules. We are not liable for delays caused by external financial systems. Users agree to follow standard financial dispute procedures.

BlakTickets may record or store communications made through support channels or platform interactions. These records may be used for quality assurance, dispute resolution, or legal compliance. Users consent to such recording by using support services. Communication records are handled securely and confidentially. Access is restricted to authorized personnel only.

BlakTickets reserves the right to modify features, design, or functionality at any time. Such changes may be made to improve performance, security, or user experience. We are not obligated to provide prior notice for minor updates. Users agree that platform evolution is part of the service. No liability arises from reasonable modifications.

Users and organizers must comply with all applicable local, state, and national laws. Any illegal use of the platform will result in immediate action. BlakTickets may report unlawful activity to relevant authorities. We cooperate fully with legal investigations when required. Compliance is mandatory for continued access to the platform.

These Terms & Conditions, along with the Privacy Policy, form the complete agreement between users and BlakTickets. They supersede any prior verbal or written understandings. No external statements shall modify these terms unless officially updated on the platform. Users acknowledge they have read and understood all terms before use. This ensures legal clarity and enforceability of the agreement.

Users acknowledge that BlakTickets acts solely as a technology platform connecting users and event organizers. No agency, partnership, or employment relationship is created between BlakTickets and any user or organizer. Each party operates independently and is responsible for its own obligations. BlakTickets does not assume control over event execution or third-party conduct. This clause ensures separation of responsibilities.

Event venues are independently managed by organizers or third-party operators. BlakTickets is not responsible for venue safety, facilities, or operational standards. Users must comply with venue-specific rules and regulations. Any disputes related to venue conditions must be addressed to the organizer. We only facilitate ticketing, not physical infrastructure.

Users acknowledge that platform performance depends on internet connectivity, devices, and third-party systems. BlakTickets is not responsible for disruptions caused by external technical failures. This includes network issues, device incompatibility, or browser limitations. Users are responsible for maintaining compatible access conditions. Service experience may vary based on external factors.

BlakTickets does not guarantee attendance success, event satisfaction, or user outcomes. Our role is limited to enabling access to event tickets. User expectations beyond ticket delivery are outside platform responsibility. All experiences are subjective to event execution. This limits liability for subjective dissatisfaction.

We actively enforce protection of all BlakTickets intellectual property rights. Any unauthorized reproduction, scraping, or commercial use is strictly prohibited. Violations may result in legal action and permanent access restrictions. We reserve the right to protect platform assets through all legal means. This ensures platform integrity and brand protection.

BlakTickets relies on external services such as payment gateways, SMS providers, and cloud infrastructure. We are not responsible for failures or delays caused by these third-party systems. Service availability may be affected by external provider performance. Users agree to accept such dependencies when using the platform. We select providers with reasonable security and reliability standards.

Users agree to indemnify and hold BlakTickets harmless from any claims arising from misuse of the platform. This includes violations of laws, third-party rights, or platform policies. Users are responsible for any damages caused by their actions. We may seek legal remedies where necessary. This protects the platform from user-caused liabilities.

BlakTickets may update its operations and terms to comply with changes in law or regulations. Such updates may take effect immediately where required for compliance. Users agree to remain compliant with evolving legal frameworks. Failure to comply may result in restricted access. This ensures long-term legal alignment.

Failure by BlakTickets to enforce any provision of these Terms does not constitute a waiver of rights. We may enforce any clause at any time in the future. This ensures flexibility in legal enforcement. Users cannot assume non-enforcement implies permission. All rights remain reserved unless explicitly waived in writing.

By using BlakTickets, users confirm they have read, understood, and agreed to all Terms & Conditions. This acknowledgment applies to all current and future use of the platform. Users accept full responsibility for compliance with these terms. Continued usage confirms ongoing acceptance. This serves as the final binding acknowledgment.

BlakTickets complies with applicable policies of Google Play Store and Apple App Store. Users agree to follow both platform-specific rules in addition to these Terms & Conditions. Any violation of store policies may result in app access restrictions or account suspension. We reserve the right to update the app to remain compliant with platform requirements. Continued use implies acceptance of platform compliance obligations.

Certain services or tickets purchased through BlakTickets may involve in-app payment flows. All payments are processed through approved and secure third-party systems. Users acknowledge that purchase confirmation is subject to successful payment authorization. BlakTickets does not guarantee transactions until payment is confirmed. Users are responsible for ensuring accurate purchase completion.

BlakTickets is distributed through official app stores and authorized digital channels only. Users should not download or install the app from unauthorized sources. We are not responsible for issues arising from unofficial or modified versions of the app. Such usage may compromise security and user data integrity. Only official versions are supported and maintained.

BlakTickets may not function on all devices, operating systems, or configurations. Users are responsible for ensuring their device meets minimum technical requirements. We do not guarantee compatibility with outdated or unsupported devices. App performance may vary depending on hardware and software conditions. Updates may be required for continued access.

BlakTickets may release updates, patches, or new versions from time to time. Users agree to install updates to maintain full functionality and security. Failure to update may result in limited access or degraded performance. We are not liable for issues caused by outdated versions of the app. Updates may include feature changes or removals.

By using BlakTickets, users consent to receive push notifications on their devices. These may include booking confirmations, event updates, reminders, and alerts. Users may manage or disable notifications through device settings. Disabling notifications may affect timely delivery of important updates. We are not responsible for missed information due to disabled notifications.

BlakTickets may request location access to show nearby events and improve recommendations. Location data is used only for service functionality and not for unauthorized tracking. Users may disable location access at any time through device settings. Some features may not function properly without location permissions. We respect user control over location privacy.

Refunds for purchases made through app stores may also be governed by Apple or Google policies. Users may need to request refunds directly through the respective platform where required. BlakTickets will assist where platform rules allow coordination. Final refund approval may depend on store policies and payment providers. We do not override app store refund mechanisms.

Users are responsible for maintaining security of their devices on which BlakTickets is installed. This includes protection against malware, unauthorized access, or device sharing risks. BlakTickets is not responsible for breaches caused by compromised devices. Users should use secure lock mechanisms and trusted environments. Device-level security is a shared responsibility.

BlakTickets availability on app stores may vary by region, device, or platform policy changes. We do not guarantee permanent availability on any specific app store. The app may be removed or restricted due to compliance or operational reasons. Users may lose access to updates if distribution is suspended. We are not liable for store-based availability changes.
